code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{fetchCurrentUser,fetchStoreCatalog,purchaseStoreItem}from'../utils/typingApi';import'../styles/Marketplace.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Marketplace(){const[catalog,setCatalog]=useState([]);const[currentUser,setCurrentUser]=useState(null);const[notice,setNotice]=useState('');const loadData=async()=>{const[user,store]=await Promise.all([fetchCurrentUser(),fetchStoreCatalog()]);setCurrentUser(user);setCatalog(store.items||[]);};useEffect(()=>{loadData();},[]);const handlePurchase=async itemId=>{try{const result=await purchaseStoreItem(itemId);setNotice(result.message||'Purchase complete.');await loadData();}catch(error){setNotice(error.message||'Purchase failed.');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"marketplace-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"marketplace-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Marketplace"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Unlock skins, avatars, frames, and premium effects with wallet balance."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"marketplace-balance",children:["Wallet: KES ",Number((currentUser===null||currentUser===void 0?void 0:currentUser.balance)||0).toLocaleString()]})]}),notice&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"marketplace-notice",children:notice}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"marketplace-grid",children:catalog.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"marketplace-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"marketplace-tag",children:item.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[item.rarity," rarity unlock"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("strong",{children:["KES ",Number(item.price||0).toLocaleString()]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`btn ${item.owned?'btn-success':'btn-primary'}`,disabled:item.owned,onClick:()=>handlePurchase(item.id),children:item.owned?'Owned':'Buy Now'})]},item.id))})]});}
